channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 2.5 inch high Lump of tarmac on road, 2nd July
item.description:
A stray lump of tarmac caused by workmen levelling the opposite side of the road. The road was not tidied up after the levelling prior to finishing off the work. Unfortunately, i cycled into which which caused me to fly over my handlebars causing damage to my cycle gear, body and bike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunfield Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole, 2nd July
item.description:
Pothole near to keep left bollard in middle of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Latham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 2nd July
item.description:
Dumped broken down wardrobe plus tree branch (big)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Lime bikes blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water is going on the street from the drain., 2nd July
item.description:
The water drain on the side path is leaking water on the road. I think it’s a water drain, it’s got Thames Water written on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crockenhill Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd July
item.description:
Some kind of 'white goods' dumped on the pavement near the broken fence at the rear of the corner shop.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Square laundry bag full to the brim with unknown rubbish, 2nd July
item.description:
Has been there for probably more than 2 weeks, keep meaning to report it. Is causing obstruction on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foul smell from drains all along broadway market, 2nd July
item.description:
The smell from the drains running along broadway market is absolutely awful. They need cleaning and washing. In the summer heat it is imposible to escape the smell all along Broadway Market
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadway Market, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rancid oil on street, 2nd July
item.description:
Rancid oil and cooking liquids from the weekend markets soaked into the road and pavement smell absolutely terrible. The area needs deep cleaning

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadway Market, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 2nd July
item.description:
It's not breathing or moving been here 12 hours it stinks I'm no rocket scientist but I think it's seen better days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
The paving slab is sticking up by enough to trip someone up- I almost tripped on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zebra crossing markings, 2nd July
item.description:
Zebra crossing markings faded

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belling Crescent, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins on the pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
These bins have been on the pavement for years. There is no room for strollers on the pavement. This is unacceptable. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of bulky bedroom furniture by recycling bins, 2nd July
item.description:
Bulky bedroom furniture removed and dumped by one of the residents who live at flat 1-11. Two men carried them out and left them by the recycling bins at York row estate - E2 8EE.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hows Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins with no lids that smell, 2nd July
item.description:
These bins are on the street every single day all year round. They need to be on property premises and they need to have lids. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocks Road view when leaving my drive, 2nd July
item.description:
When I try and reverse out of my drive or leave my driveway, I have to hang out in the road to see around the overgrowth and is becoming dangerous with cars coming super fast up the hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Poverest Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timber sheeting dumped on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
This arrived soon after the last fly tipping here was removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plympton sign, 2nd July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 2nd July
item.description:
SORN and parked in same place 6+ months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: Garden waste and old fence panels in communal lawn, 2nd July
item.description:
Has been there for several weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longfield Crescent, Forest Hill, Greater London
